author: valenzine
description: Converts raw URLs into markdown links by automatically fetching webpage titles. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: valenzine
manifest.description: Converts raw URLs into markdown links by automatically fetching webpage titles.
manifest.name: URL Name Extractor

name: URL Name Extractor

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Standardize API key input width and enhance error handling (#10)

* Set width for url-namer API key input

Add a CSS rule in styles.css to set .url-namer-api-key-input to 300px, standardizing the width of the API key input field for the url-namer UI.

* Bump minAppVersion and remove builtin-modules

Update manifest to require Obsidian v0.12.16 (was 0.12.0). Remove the unused devDependency "builtin-modules" from package.json to tidy devDependencies.

* Harden fetch parsing and error handling

Add stronger typing and robust error handling across URL fetching and UI code. Introduces AggregatedFetchError and API response interfaces (WaybackApiResponse, MicrolinkApiResponse); convert several catch/error messages to safely handle unknown errors using instanceof checks and String(); use window.setTimeout for delays; type regex replace callbacks; parse Archive.org and Microlink JSON with explicit types and clearer error messages; construct aggregated fetch errors with attached simple/complex errors; improve bot-protection fallback messaging; normalize Microlink error/message selection with nullish coalescing; and replace a hardcoded input width with a CSS class for the API key input. These changes improve safety, diagnostics, and maintainability when network calls fail or return unexpected shapes.

* Update esbuild.config.mjs

* Update versions.json mapping for 2.0.3

Change the mapping for release 2.0.3 from "1.0.0" to "0.12.16" in versions.json to reflect the correct target runtime version.

* Add semicolon to node:module import

Add a missing semicolon to the import of `builtinModules` from 'node:module' in esbuild.config.mjs for syntax/style consistency and to satisfy linters or formatting tools.

* Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Potential fix for pull request finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot Autofix powered by AI <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Release 2.0.4: bump version and fixes

Bump package and extension to v2.0.4 and add changelog entry. Updates include:
- Updated manifest and package.json version to 2.0.4 and aligned app version mappings in versions.json to 0.12.16.
- Changelog documents fixes: standardized API key input CSS, safer error handling (explicit instanceof Error checks), switched to window.setTimeout for popout compatibility, added typed API response interfaces, and introduced AggregatedFetchError.
- Maintenance: replaced deprecated builtin-modules usage in build config with Node's built-ins list.
Also updated package-lock to reflect the version bump.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Reliability and anti-rate limiting:**
- URLs are now processed sequentially with a configurable delay (`requestDelay`) between requests (default 1 second, adjustable 0–5 seconds in settings), reducing the risk of hitting rate limits when processing multiple URLs. The UI now reports accurate counts of successes and failures.

**Bot protection and fallback improvements:**
- Bot protection detection is improved to handle HTTP 202/403/503 status codes and common Cloudflare/AWS WAF patterns. The plugin now uses a progressive strategy: simple requests first, browser emulation if needed, and external fallbacks (Microlink or Archive.org) only when required. Documentation and user-facing messages have been updated to reflect these changes. 

**HTML entity decoding and title extraction:**
- Page titles are now automatically decoded for common HTML entities, including basic, typographic, dash, special, and numeric entities. This ensures titles appear correctly in markdown. 

**Settings validation and UI enhancements:**
- Settings are now validated and clamped to safe values on load (e.g., `requestDelay`), and the UI for redirect handling has been removed since Obsidian's `requestUrl` now manages redirects automatically. 

**Code quality and error handling:**
- Introduced custom error classes for clearer error handling, removed unused redirect cache and related code, and improved error reporting to the user. 

**Special thanks** to @Bamajon1974 for the feedback!

* Fix follow Obsidian guidelines

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Core plugin improvements:**

* Updated the default URL regex pattern in `main.ts` and documentation to improve compatibility (especially with iOS) and to better avoid matching URLs already inside markdown links (`[text](url)`). [[1]](diffhunk://#diff-564c860307257bfac9176f554a35aa858c350a59d75c0dcd0a5d63a480805bd0L15-R15) [[2]](diffhunk://#diff-b335630551682c19a781afebcf4d07bf978fb1f8ac04c6bf87428ed5106870f5L34-R37)
* Enhanced the URL processing logic in `main.ts` to skip URLs that are already part of markdown links, ensuring only raw URLs are converted to titled links. Users are notified if no raw URLs are found. [[1]](diffhunk://#diff-564c860307257bfac9176f554a35aa858c350a59d75c0dcd0a5d63a480805bd0R169) [[2]](diffhunk://#diff-564c860307257bfac9176f554a35aa858c350a59d75c0dcd0a5d63a480805bd0L178-R212)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/valenzine/obsidian-url-name-extractor/compare/2.0.0...2.0.1

releases.author: valenzine
releases.description:
## What's Changed
- v2.0.0 Fallback for blocked URLs by @valenzine in https://github.com/valenzine/obsidian-url-name-extractor/pull/1
- **Improved URL detection**: Liberal regex pattern that correctly handles all valid URLs including:
  - Domains with any valid TLD (`.as`, `.museum`, `.technology`, etc.)
  - DOI links (`https://doi.org/10.xxxx/yyyy`)
  - Blog posts and academic articles from various platforms
- **Configurable URL regex**: Customize the URL matching pattern in plugin settings
- **Site-specific title extraction**: Define custom title regex patterns for websites with non-standard HTML (e.g., lazy-loaded content)
- **Better error handling**: Clear error messages when regex validation fails

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/valenzine/obsidian-url-name-extractor/commits/2.0.0
releases.name: 2.0.0 Fallback for blocked URLs
